reviews.review_msg: lucas changed my mind about so many things and even though it was hard it was actually fun. if you are close minded or skip a lot of classes take another class. loved the poetry workshop!

I can't say enough positive things about Mark. He is a wonderful professor and person. I found his class inspiring, engaging and challenging in a reflective way. He's is a kind, genuine person who works with his students. A GPA booster for sure but only if you work hard and fully participate.  I can tell he is passionate about the subject!
